title: Emergence World: A Laboratory for Evaluating Long-Horizon Agent Autonomy
abstract: Tired of boring AI experiments? Try "Emergence World" – a dynamic lab where intelligent agents autonomously explore, grow, and evolve in complex environments. From simple tasks to extreme adventures, the possibilities are limitless and tailored by you. Ready to face the challenges of the future?
abstract_zh: 你是不是已经厌倦了那些干巴巴的AI实验？来试试“Emergence World”吧，这里就像是一个充满奇遇的大实验室！在这里，你可以见证智能代理如何在复杂环境中自主探索、成长和进化。从简单的任务到挑战极限的冒险，一切都由你定制。准备好迎接未来的挑战了吗？
